name: Malware as a Service Behaviour
notes:
This rule triggers when a Malware as a service behaviour is observed.

These behaviours include using a download utility on the Endpoint and the file path showing the indication of compromise.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events match at least 1 times in 15 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malware as a Service Path IOC match
BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malware as a Service Path IOC
conditions_text: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events match at least 1 times in 15 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malware as a Service Path IOC match
thresholds: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events match at least 1 times in 15 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malware as a Service Path IOC match
TD_list: APPLY Malware as a Service Behaviour on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB:BehaviorDefinition: Download Utilities in Events match at least 1 times in 15 minutes after any of BB:BehaviorDefinition: Malware as a Service Path IOC match
RED_list: Event name: Malware as a Service Behaviour
Event description: Detected when a Malware as a service behaviour is observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
